settings.title: Settings
settings.appearance.communityThemes.desc: Browse and apply themes created by the community
settings.appearance.font.desc: Choose from presets, Google Fonts, URLs, or upload your own
settings.appearance.waveform.desc: Show a visual waveform of the track in the progress bar (Experimental)
settings.appearance.albumBackground.desc: Use the album art as a blurred background in the player
settings.appearance.dynamicColor.desc: Extract colors from album art for dynamic UI accents
settings.appearance.qualityBadge.desc: Show the audio quality badge on tracks
settings.appearance.trackDate.desc: Show the release date of tracks in track lists
settings.appearance.coverArtSize.desc: Set the size of the cover art in the player
settings.appearance.visualizer.desc: Choose a visualizer to display during playback
settings.appearance.visualizerBrightness: Adjust the brightness of the visualizer. Lower this if the visualizer is too bright for you.
settings.appearance.randomizePresets.des: Select next preset randomly instead of sequentially
settings.interface.recommendedSongs.desc: Display recommended songs on the home page
settings.interface.nowPlaying.desc: Display the now playing panel on the right side
settings.interface.fullscreenClick.desc: Click on the album cover to open it in fullscreen
settings.interface.cardStyle.desc: Choose how cards are displayed in the library
settings.interface.sidebar.desc: Choose which sections appear in the sidebar
settings.interface.modalNavigation.desc: Close open modals when navigating to a new page
settings.audio.monoAudio.desc: Mix stereo audio down to mono
settings.audio.exponentialVolume.desc: Use exponential scaling for the volume slider
settings.audio.equalizer.desc: Fine-tune your audio with a 10-band equalizer
settings.downloads.quality.desc: Choose the audio quality for downloaded tracks
settings.downloads.container.desc: Choose the container format for lossless downloads
settings.downloads.bulkDownload.desc: Download entire playlists or albums at once
settings.scrobbling.lastfm.desc: Scrobble your listening history to Last.fm
settings.scrobbling.listenbrainz.desc: Scrobble your listening history to ListenBrainz
settings.scrobbling.maloja.desc: Scrobble your listening history to a self-hosted Maloja instance
settings.scrobbling.librefm.desc: Scrobble your listening history to Libre.fm
settings.system.analytics.desc: Help improve Monochrome by sending anonymous usage data
settings.system.pwaUpdate.desc: Automatically install app updates in the background
settings.system.contentBlocking.desc: Manage blocked artists, albums, and tracks
